content.en:
The goal of the Void Overlord was clear, he first went to find those second-stage overlords who had obtained a little Void Silver Water.

These overlords are about the same strength as he used to be, and they have not yet condensed immeasurable blood, and they urgently need the treasure of Hailou Tianjin.

As for the Void Silver Water, although it was very valuable and still above the Hailou Heavenly Gold, it couldn't help them condense the first drop of immeasurable blood.

Void Silver Water can indeed help the third-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms condense immeasurable blood, but that is when they have the first drop of immeasurable blood, Void Silver Water can be integrated into the first drop of immeasurable blood, gathering other blood and many resources to condense more immeasurable blood again.

But in the absence of immeasurable blood in itself, the Void Silver Water could not play its role.

Therefore, those overlords must have hoped to exchange the Void Silver Water for the Sea Tower Tianjin.

After all, being able to step into the third stage is what they want most.

However, none of the other overlords wanted these overlords to enter the third stage, so they couldn't find a deal to trade with.

But the Void Whale Overlord appeared, looking for these overlords to trade, and immediately attracted a lot of second-stage overlords.

......

"Void Whale Overlord, can you really exchange the Void Silver Water for some Hailou Heavenly Gold here?"

The Xuanlong Overlord of the Voidless Galaxy found the Void Whale Overlord and asked.

"It turned out to be the Xuanlong Overlord, so naturally he could exchange the Void Silver Water for Hailou Tianjin, although the value of the Void Silver Water far exceeded that of Hailou Tianjin. But for the second-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, Hailou Tianjin's usefulness was even greater. Therefore, a cloud of Void Silver Water can only be exchanged for ten pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold!" said the Void Whale Overlord.

"A cloud of Void Silver Water can only be exchanged for ten pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold!"

The Xuanlong Overlord only hesitated for a moment before making a decision.

That's the deal!

No matter how precious the Void Silver Water was, it couldn't help him condense the first drop of immeasurable blood, if he didn't trade it, it would really take a long time for him to get enough Hailou Heavenly Gold on his own.

In case something happens during the period, such as a more powerful overlord snatching his Hailou Tianjin, he will lose all his previous achievements.

So, you have to break through to the third stage as soon as possible, and that's the most important thing.

"Okay, I'll trade!" the Dragon Overlord nodded.

He now has sixty-eight regiments of Void Silver Water, and he can trade six hundred and eighty pieces of Hailou Heavenly Gold from the Void Whale Overlord, which is almost enough to impact the third stage.

"Then let's trade!"

Void Whale Overlord Dao.

Soon, they closed the deal.

With the passage of time, the Void Whale Overlord and many overlords have completed transactions, and they have also secretly traded with Ye Tian again and again, and both parties have gained huge benefits.

Among them, Ye Tian gained the greatest benefit, and he gradually gathered a large amount of Void Gold Water in his hands.

And the Void Whale Overlord is also a little gained, and he also has some Void Gold Water on his body.

It can be said that what Ye Tian and the Void Whale Overlord did was to buy and sell without capital, and those overlords would pay for it.

But there are so many overlords in the void galaxy, and there are only so many void silver waters.

Therefore, soon Ye Tian's deal with the Void Whale Overlord ended here.

......

"One thousand three hundred and two groups of Void Gold Water, for the time being, I can only obtain so much, although there are still many third-stage overlords who have Void Silver Water in their hands, and to trade with them, I must take out the Void Gold Water, if the overlords of the Voidless Galaxy know that I have a large amount of Void Gold Water in my hands, I am afraid that even the top overlords such as the Overlord of Qingshan will also know the information. When the time comes, the Qingshan Overlord will be eyeing me, and it will be a little troublesome!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, the place with the Void Silver Water is not only here in the Voidless Galaxy, he can also trade the Void Gold Water through other channels, but he has to risk being targeted!

"Let's slowly condense the immeasurable bones first!"

Ye Tian muttered.

As the years passed, the immeasurable bones on Ye Tian's body condensed one by one, and then underwent extreme tempering.

A hundred immeasurable bones!

One hundred and twenty immeasurable bones!

One hundred and thirty immeasurable bones!

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's Hailou Tianjin consumption rate was too fast, and the more immeasurable bones he condensed, the more difficult it would be to continue to refine to the limit, and the more Hailou Tianjin's gold would be consumed.

In addition, he had traded a lot of Hailou Tianjin before, so the amount of his own Hailou Tianjin was not enough.

"The reserves of the sea building gold in the Voidless Galaxy are not too much, and the endless years have been consumed, and I can't get too much sea floor gold in the Voidless Galaxy!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he was ready to try to make a deal from the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, trading enough Hailou Gold at once.

"Just use the identity of the Xuanming Great Ancestor, if you really suffer an attack and die, it's a big deal to change your identity!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

The capital of hurricanes, the mountain of ghosts.

Ye Tian came here and entered the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

Since he was a high-level immeasurable lifeform, he entered the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, and it was directly the Wind Silver Great Ancestor of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion who received Ye Tian.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, long time no see!"

Fengyin Great Ancestor Dao.

"Fengyin Great Ancestor, I came to the Remnant Heaven Pavilion this time to buy Hailou Gold, I don't know if the Remnant Heaven Pavilion has it?"

Ye Tian said directly.

"Hailou Golden !!"

Fengyin Great Ancestor was a little shocked, this is a scarce resource, even if the Remnant Heaven Pavilion has Sea House Gold, it is impossible to take it out and sell it!

So, Fengyin Great Ancestor said: "Xuanming Great Ancestor, our Remnant Heaven Pavilion does have Sea House Gold, but it is impossible to sell it, after all, even I will have to take a long time to get a small amount of Sea House Gold!"

"I'm not trading with you, I'm dealing with the top behind you. I am willing to exchange Hailou Tianjin for Hailou Jin!" Ye Tian said.

"What, Hailou Tianjin!!!"

Fengyin Great Ancestor was shocked.

Is the Great Ancestor of Xuan Ming stupid, he is willing to trade Hailou Tianjin for Hailou Gold!

"I can't be the master of this matter!" said Fengyin Great Ancestor clearly.

After all, he was just an ordinary first-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, so naturally he couldn't meddle in the trading of this kind of resource.

"Then please ask you to send a great ancestor who is qualified to be the master!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, but it will take a little time!" said the Wind Silver Ancestor.

Immediately, he informed the headquarters of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

Time passed little by little, and it didn't take long for a great ancestor to quietly come to the Remnant Heaven Pavilion of Guidu Mountain through special channels.

And Ye Tian also saw this high-level of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, who was a high-level immeasurable lifeform that had stepped into the third stage, and was also a woman.

"Xuanming Great Ancestor, this is the elder of our Remnant Heaven Pavilion Headquarters, Snow Feather Great Ancestor!"

Fengyin Ancestor introduced.
